CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, event_date DATE);
SELECT id, dayofyear(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE leap_year_dates AS SELECT event_date, dayofyear(event_date) AS doy FROM test_dates WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM event_date) % 4 = 0;
SELECT d.id, d.event_date, l.doy FROM test_dates d JOIN leap_year_dates l ON d.event_date = l.event_date WHERE l.doy IN (31, 60, 61);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, dayofyear(event_date) AS doy, event_date FROM test_dates) AS subquery WHERE doy >= 1 AND doy <= 365 ORDER BY doy;
SELECT MAX(doy) FROM (SELECT dayofyear(event_date) AS doy FROM test_dates GROUP BY event_date HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AS grouped_dates;
SELECT event_date, dayofyear(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date BETWEEN DATE '2024-01-01' AND DATE '2024-12-31' ORDER BY event_date;
WITH date_info AS (SELECT id, event_date, dayofyear(event_date) AS doy FROM test_dates) SELECT AVG(doy) FROM date_info WHERE doy BETWEEN 60 AND 120;
SELECT d.id, d.event_date, l.doy FROM test_dates d LEFT JOIN (SELECT event_date, dayofyear(event_date) AS doy FROM test_dates WHERE doy = 1) l ON d.event_date = l.event_date WHERE l.doy IS NULL;
